concepts.title: Banach and Hilbert spaces
concepts.blurb: Infinite-dimensional normed spaces provide the analytic home for operators and PDEs.

concepts.title: Bounded operators and adjoints
concepts.blurb: Linear operators on Hilbert spaces admit operator norms, adjoints, and projection geometry.

concepts.title: Spectral theorem viewpoint
concepts.blurb: Self-adjoint and normal operators are analyzed through spectral decompositions.
